name: Curry Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 1 teaspoon of poppy seeds.
2. Measure out 1/2 teaspoon of ground cloves.
3. Measure out 1 teaspoon of white pepper.
4. Measure out 1 tablespoon of turmeric.
5. Measure out 1 tablespoon of ground cumin.
6. Measure out 2 teaspoons of ground mace.
7. Measure out 2 tablespoons of ground coriander.
8. Measure out 1 tablespoon of ground ginger.
9. Measure out 2 teaspoons of ground cardamom.
10. Measure out 1 teaspoon of chili powder.
11. Measure out 1 teaspoon of mustard seed.
12. Measure out 1/2 teaspoon of ground fenugreek.
13. Combine all the measured ingredients in a bowl.
14. Transfer the combined mixture to an airtight container for storage.
